category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides statistics in git; official README says git-quick-stats accesses statistics in a git repository.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is git-quick-stats; official README heading is GIT quick statistics.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project site; official GitHub README provides usage, installation, and command documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/git-quick-stats/git-quick-stats, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies git statistics; official README describes commit, contributor, file statistics plus interactive and non-interactive modes.
